'''Ludo Kressh's armband''' was worn by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Ludo Kressh]] during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]. When worn, this [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Dark side artifact/Legends|tainted object]] could increase the wearer's raw physical power, as well as offer some minor protection. It is believed that the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] found this armband while she was in the [[Tomb of Ludo Kressh]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the game, the armband can only be worn if the character's alignment leans towards the dark side.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
